To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Subject: 



 

 

Hello Jeffrey and 
welcome back to NY!  YOur day of appt's is Tuesday 9th:

 

1:00   
teeth cleaning

2:00   
Meet with Howard Dolch to view 640 Fifth Avenue, 21st floor (meet in lobby) btwn 
51 and 52 Streets

2:30   
Meet Glen Isaacson to view 405 Lexington Avenue, 71st floor  (meet at 
reception desk) btwn 42 & 43 Streets

3:15   Meet Deborah Grubman and David Dubin to view 41 
East 70th Street 

3:45   
Haircut w/Phillipe

 

 

Also wanted you to 
know Helen and I will be starting our new schedule as 
follows:

 

Mon's:    Helen,   Arrival  8:30 


Tues's:   
 Helen,  Arrival   8:30

Wed's:   
Lesley,   Arrival 8:30    Helen,   Arrival 
9:30

Thurs's:  
Lesley,  Arrival 8:30     Helen,  Arrival 
9:30

Fri's:      Lesley,  Arrival  
8:30    

 

Rahna will be in 
everyday 9:00-6:00  (BTW-I think we could change her to 10:00-6:00 and we 
would be fine)

 

I look forward to 
seeing you this week!  It feels like it's been forever.  I hope things 
are going well.  ...and please know, if there is ever a Mon or 
Tues you want me to come in or a day you would like me to arrive later and 
stay later sort of thing, just let me know.  I am happy to

:) 
Les

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein
